title: EPM Coffee Chat Episode 16: AI in EPM with Edward Roske
description: Long-form coffee chat with the Toronto EPM User Group crew (Arun, Azmat, Fred, and Harsh) on AI in EPM: what gets automated first, how planning shifts from human-first to computer-first, and why knowing when a number is wrong still beats producing it fast. Some Oracle roadmap talk too (Autonomous Database, MCP, Essbase), plus a straight answer on what AI means for entry-level finance jobs.

title: Lost His Dad at 27, Then Built a Billion-Dollar Company
description: Long-form sit-down with Crystal Bai on losing my father at 27, founding interRel two months later, and the 25 years between that decision and merging into Argano. Some grief, some accidental career advice, and a fair amount about why founder companies and family companies are not as different as people pretend.

title: Edward Roske Interviews Paul Lepine of Grant Thornton at Kscope25
description: From the ODTUG podcast booth at Kscope25 in Grapevine, Texas. Edward sits down with Paul Lepine, Grant Thornton's Alliance Director for Oracle and NetSuite across North America, with 15+ years inside Oracle before that.

title: Edward Roske Interviews Tim Tow of Applied OLAP at Kscope25
description: From the ODTUG podcast booth at Kscope25 in Grapevine, Texas. Edward sits down with Tim Tow, founder and president of Applied OLAP, creator of Dodeca, and the first Oracle ACE Director in the Hyperion / Essbase community.

title: Edward Roske Interviews the Accordion Crew at Kscope25
description: From the ODTUG podcast booth at Kscope25 in Grapevine, Texas. Edward sits down with the crew from Accordion, the private-equity-focused financial consulting firm with a major Oracle EPM practice (and the team that absorbed Platform Specialists in 2024).

title: Edward Roske Interviews the Infosys Team at Kscope25
description: From the ODTUG podcast booth at Kscope25 in Grapevine, Texas. Edward sits down with the Infosys team on Oracle Cloud, EPM, and what the partner ecosystem looks like at global scale.

title: Edward Roske Interviews Abhi Nerurkar of EPMware at Kscope25
description: From the ODTUG podcast booth at Kscope25 in Grapevine, Texas. Edward sits down with Abhi Nerurkar of EPMware, a recent Kscope speaker on enterprise master data and Oracle PCMCS integrations.

title: Edward Roske Interviews Charlie Yousef of Version 1 at Kscope25
description: From the ODTUG podcast booth at Kscope25 in Grapevine, Texas. Edward sits down with Charlie Yousef of Version 1, the global Apex and Oracle consultancy.

title: Edward Roske Interviews Dimpy Sharma of Opkey at Kscope25
description: From the ODTUG podcast booth at Kscope25 in Grapevine, Texas. Edward sits down with Dimpy Sharma of Opkey, the AI-driven test automation platform for Oracle Cloud applications. (Her first Kscope.)

title: Edward Roske Interviews Matthew Clymer of Datavail at Kscope25
description: From the ODTUG podcast booth at Kscope25 in Grapevine, Texas. Edward sits down with Matthew Clymer of Datavail, the managed services and Oracle EPM consultancy. (His third Kscope.)

title: Edward Roske Interviews Julie Bouchard of Redgate at Kscope25
description: From the ODTUG podcast booth at Kscope25 in Grapevine, Texas. Edward sits down with Julie Bouchard of Redgate, the database DevOps tooling company.

title: Edward Roske Interviews Moe Gohary of Donyati at Kscope25
description: From the ODTUG podcast booth at Kscope25 in Grapevine, Texas. Edward sits down with Moe Gohary, founder and CEO of Donyati, the Oracle EPM and ERP consulting firm he started in 2015 after senior roles at PwC, GM, and KPMG.

title: Edward Roske Interviews Brock Ray of Traust at Kscope25
description: From the ODTUG podcast booth at Kscope25 in Grapevine, Texas. Edward sits down with Brock Ray of Traust, the Oracle Apex consultancy. (His second Kscope; Traust rotates the team that comes each year.)

title: Edward Roske Interviews Danielle White of Donyati at Kscope25
description: From the ODTUG podcast booth at Kscope25 in Grapevine, Texas. Edward sits down with Danielle White, an 18-year Oracle EPM veteran now at Donyati and the newly-elected Secretary of the ODTUG Executive Committee for FY26.

title: Edward Roske Interviews Mia Urman of AuraPlayer at Kscope25
description: From the ODTUG podcast booth at Kscope25 in Grapevine, Texas. Edward sits down with Oracle ACE Director Mia Urman, CEO of AuraPlayer and a leading voice on Oracle Forms modernization and the migration paths off legacy enterprise apps.

title: Edward Roske Interviews Monty Latiolais of Insum (Talan) at Kscope25
description: From the ODTUG podcast booth at Kscope25 in Grapevine, Texas. Edward sits down with Monty Latiolais, Director of Business Development at Insum (now part of Talan, the largest APEX consultancy in North America) and former ODTUG President from 2012 to 2015.

title: Edward Roske Interviews Kellyn Gorman of Redgate at Kscope25
description: From the ODTUG podcast booth at Kscope25 in Grapevine, Texas. Edward sits down with Kellyn Gorman, Database and AI Advocate at Redgate, Oracle ACE Director, Oak Table Network member, and Kscope18/19 Conference Chair.

title: Edward Roske Interviews Ryan McWhorter of Deloitte at Kscope25
description: From the ODTUG podcast booth at Kscope25 in Grapevine, Texas. Edward sits down with Ryan McWhorter of Deloitte, one of his (per the intro) favorite people in the EPM world.

title: ODTUG Lifetime Achievement Award: Edward Roske at Kscope25
description: Edward receives the ODTUG Lifetime Achievement Award at Kscope25 in Grapevine, Texas, an honor given to fewer than five people in ODTUG's history. He announced this would be his final Kscope as a conference regular.

title: ODTUG Presents Kscope or Bust: An Intergalactic Odyssey
description: ODTUG's animated Kscope25 promo. A crew of misfit alien tech enthusiasts intercepts a mysterious signal from Earth, the legendary Kscope conference, and sets course. Edward voices an animated version of himself, fedora intact, in a four-minute intergalactic odyssey.

title: Devs on Tape x Kscope25: The Inspiring Journey of Edward Roske
description: In-depth interview covering Edward's career from founding interRel at 22 through AI ventures at Caprus and Dawnward, plus the intersection of AI, EPM, and data privacy.

title: GenAI in the Wild: An Interview with Edward Roske
description: Interview covering Edward's use of GenAI tools and his perspective on AI adoption for finance professionals. Part of the Oracle + AI Series.

title: PACE Moments: Leaders in Business with Edward Roske
description: A 'Leaders in Business' interview from the Profitability Analytics Center of Excellence. Edward on his path from founding interRel to data science, and where analytics actually helps a company (and where it tends to fall short).

title: The Top Five Strategic EPM Trends in 2023: ChatGPT, Autonomous, and Beyond
description: Webinar exploring innovative trends in Oracle Cloud EPM including Narrative Reporting, EDM, Account Reconciliation Cloud, and Scenario Modeling.

title: Edward Roske Interviews Glenn Schwartzberg at Kscope23
description: From the ODTUG podcast booth at Kscope23. Edward sits down with longtime Essbase contributor Glenn Schwartzberg on his contributions to the EPM community and advice for newer practitioners.

title: Argano Employee Testimonial: Edward Roske
description: Video testimonial featuring Edward as part of Argano's employee spotlight series.

title: Masterclass with Your Kscope22 Guru: Ask Edward Roske about Strategic EPM
description: Hour-long Q&A session where Edward fields strategic EPM questions from Kscope22 attendees. Hosted by ArganoInterRel for Oracle Business Unit.

title: How AI Helps Take Your Power Back: Reclaiming Your Professional Future
description: Presentation on how AI can empower finance executives to reclaim control of their careers and enhance their strategic value.

title: PACE Academic IG: Transitioning from Data to Decisions for Analytics Success
description: Discussion panel with Edward Roske and Dr. Prashanth Southekal on leveraging data and analytics for improved business performance.

title: The State of the Economy & What it Means to FP&A
description: Edward on what a volatile economy means for FP&A, and why the planning function matters more when the only constant is change.

title: FedEx's Journey to the Cloud with EPM and Analytics
description: An interactive interview: Edward and former FedEx project lead Russ Story on FedEx's move to Oracle Cloud EPM, run out of a Financial Systems Center of Excellence that treats finance like logistics.

title: EPM Provides Agility & Speed Amid Constant Disruption
description: Edward on using EPM for agility and speed when disruption is the baseline rather than the exception.

title: Long Live Essbase: The Present and the Future
description: Edward on the rumored death (and possible resurrection) of Essbase: OAC Essbase, Essbase Cloud, and the on-prem comeback nobody saw coming.

title: Scenario Planning: Pivoting from Pandemic to Proactive
description: An Oracle session with Edward on scenario planning, recorded when 'pivoting from pandemic to proactive' was the entire mood of corporate finance.

title: State of Business Analytics 2021 Webcast
description: Edward walks through interRel's State of Business Analytics 2021 survey: what hundreds of organizations actually reported about EPM and analytics, minus the vendor spin.

title: Oracle Analytics in Times of Change: Data Science In a Box
description: Edward's 'Data Science In a Box' session for Oracle Analytics: building reports and models fast when everything is changing at once.

title: Why Move to the Oracle Cloud: Busting Migration Myths
description: Edward and an interRel 'MythBusters' crew test the urban legends about moving Oracle EPM to the cloud. Some myths confirmed, some busted.

title: Essbase: Do I Use 19c on OAC or Freeform Planning?
description: Edward and Glenn Schwartzberg argue Essbase 19c on OAC versus Freeform Planning for the cloud migration, each convinced the other picked wrong.

title: Ask the Experts Panel
description: Edward joins an Oracle EPM and BI leadership panel taking questions from the audience.

title: Calc Scripts for Mere Mortals: What Has Changed Since Solutions 2007
description: Edward's 'Calc Scripts for Mere Mortals,' updated: what has changed in the Essbase calc engine since Solutions 2007. A classic interRel session title, refreshed.

title: Back to the Hyperion Future: Where We've Been and Where We're Going (Keynote)
description: Edward's Solutions 2020 keynote, 'Back to the Hyperion Future': where Oracle EPM has been and where it is going. (No DeLorean, but the title earns it.)

title: The Future of Reporting & Analysis: The Emergence of AI and Machine Learning
description: Edward on the three generations of analytics: IT-governed models, business self-service, and what AI and machine learning change next. He gave this one across several Oracle user groups in 2020.

title: 5 EPM Tools for Thriving in a Changing Economy
description: An hour with Edward on five EPM tools for a changing economy, built for finance teams who got caught flat-footed in early 2020.

title: Keynote on the Future of Healthcare
description: Edward's keynote for Oracle on where healthcare analytics is headed, and the decisions the data should be informing (and usually isn't).

title: When to Use Analytics, EPM, and Essbase: Better Together
description: Edward's session from the Oracle Analytics Virtual Summit 2020 on choosing between analytics, EPM, and Essbase for a given job. (The title gives away his answer: better together.)

title: 5 Tools to Survive and Thrive During Times of Change
description: Edward presents five planning tools for surviving (and ideally outlasting) a year when every forecast broke at once. From the early-pandemic uncertainty-planning series.

title: Edward Roske: Make Time for Scenario Planning
description: Edward's one piece of advice for every business: make time for scenario planning. (He means it.)

title: The 9 Things to Analyze to Keep Your Business Going Through a Recession
description: Edward's short list of nine things to analyze to keep a business running through a downturn.

title: Surviving the Retail Apocalypse 2.0 with Scenario Planning
description: Edward on why retailers should lean on scenario planning to outlast the 'Retail Apocalypse 2.0.'

title: How Industries Can Plan, Report, and Analyze to Get Ahead
description: Edward on how planning, reporting, and analysis keep a business afloat in a downturn.

title: The 3 Things You Need to Do to Get Ahead of the Recession
description: Ninety seconds: the three things Edward says to do right now to get ahead of a recession.

title: How to Get Ahead in Times of Business Uncertainty
description: A brief Edward clip on getting ahead when the business climate turns uncertain.

title: Focus on the Future with Strategic Modeling
description: Why strategic modeling earns its keep when the future is unclear (Edward, in under a minute).

title: The Tools You Need to Make Informed Business Decisions Faster
description: A short clip on the tools Edward says you need to make faster, better-informed business decisions.

title: interRel Consulting Wins Partner of the Year for Business Analytics at Oracle OpenWorld 2019
description: interRel wins Oracle's Business Analytics Partner of the Year at OpenWorld 2019. One of five Partner of the Year wins over the firm's run.

title: interRel on Oracle EPM Cloud and Being Ready for the Future
description: Edward on the value of Oracle EPM Cloud and staying ready for whatever comes next.

title: Kscope17 Interview: Edward Roske and Jonathon Eastman
description: From the ODTUG booth at Kscope17, Edward Roske and Jonathon Eastman talk Essbase, EPM, and the year in Oracle.

title: interRel on Oracle Financial Consolidation and Close Cloud (FCCS)
description: A short interRel explainer on Oracle's Financial Consolidation and Close Cloud, with Edward, from the early FCCS days.

title: Best Practices for Your Strategic Oracle EPM Road Map: Building Your 3 Year Plan
description: A 30-second teaser for an interRel session on mapping a three-year Oracle EPM road map (leading practices, naturally).

title: Strategic Assessments
description: A 24-second interRel teaser on EPM strategic assessments (blink and you will miss it).

title: AUSOUG & APOUG Tour: Oracle Cloud Sessions Across Australia and Asia
description: Edward presented sessions on Oracle Cloud topics across Australian and Asia-Pacific Oracle User Groups in Australia, Singapore, Kuala Lumpur, and Hong Kong.

title: Kscope15 Interview: Edward Roske, interRel Consulting
description: A short Kscope15 booth interview with Edward on interRel and the state of Essbase and Hyperion Planning that year.

title: interRel Presents: Play It Forward!
description: interRel's pitch for sharing Oracle BI and EPM education through free, searchable video, with Edward fronting the mission.

title: Kscope15: It's a Wrap
description: Wrap-up video from ODTUG Kscope15 featuring Edward Roske.

title: Edward Roske at GUOB Tech Day
description: Edward's talk at GUOB Tech Day, the Brazilian Oracle user group conference. Roughly 40 minutes on Oracle BI and EPM (the title card is in Portuguese; the Essbase is not).

title: Happy Holidays from interRel!
description: interRel's Oracle ACEs (Edward, Tracy McMullen, Glenn Schwartzberg, Sarah Zumbrum, Robert Gideon) clock in at the Elf Factory for the holidays.

title: Real Time BI with Kevin & Stewart: Ep 022
description: The Real Time BI live show from Kscope14, with Oracle ACE Directors Edward Roske and Glenn Schwartzberg.

title: The Battle in Seattle
description: A 53-second interRel promo from 2014, 'The Battle in Seattle.'

title: OTN Latin America Tour 2014
description: Oracle ACE Directors Edward Roske and Glenn Schwartzberg tour Latin America with the Oracle Technology Network (49 seconds of the highlight reel).

title: Edward Roske on Social Media
description: Fifty-six seconds of Edward holding forth on social media, filmed at a conference by Oracle ACE Director Bjoern Rost.

title: Real Time BI with Kevin & Stewart: Edward Roske, Unnecessarily Censored
description: A 60-second bit from the Kscope14 livestream of Real Time BI with Kevin & Stewart, with Edward's commentary bleeped for effect. The censorship is, per the title, unnecessary.

title: Edward Roske of interRel Consulting Suffers from Low-T. Do You?
description: A Kscope-era comedy spoof, styled as a pharmaceutical ad, in which Edward bravely battles 'Low-T.' The title is real, and so is the video.

title: Kscope14 Interview: Edward Roske (and His Hat)
description: Kevin McGinley interviews Edward at the ODTUG Social Media Lounge. Edward presented sessions on Oracle BI Mobile, Essbase Optimization, and Cutting-Edge Essbase.

title: Edward Roske on Oracle HPCM at MD Anderson Cancer Center
description: Discussing implementing Hyperion Profitability and Cost Management at MD Anderson Cancer Center to determine profitability at the physician level.

title: Real Time BI with Kevin & Stewart: Ep 014
source: Real Time BI with Kevin & Stewart
description: Part two of Edward and Glenn Schwartzberg's visit with Kevin McGinley and Stewart Bryson on Real Time BI.

title: Real Time BI with Kevin & Stewart: Ep 013
source: Real Time BI with Kevin & Stewart
description: Edward Roske and Glenn Schwartzberg guest on Kevin McGinley and Stewart Bryson's Real Time BI. Part one of two.

title: Kscope13 Interview: Edward Roske and Monica Hasebi
description: A quick Kscope13 booth interview with Edward and Monica Hasebi.

title: Kscope Conference Chair Edward Roske Thanks Attendees
description: Edward, as Kscope Conference Chair, thanking everyone for coming. (He held the chair in 2011 and 2012. The clip runs 26 seconds.)

title: Kscope Community Service Day
description: Twenty-eight seconds from Kscope's Community Service Day, 2011, Edward included.

title: Kaleidoscope 2010 Agenda
description: A 2010 promo for ODTUG Kaleidoscope (the conference later renamed Kscope), walking that year's agenda. The oldest clip on this page.
